MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ELENO NUNEZ GONZALEZ, Esq. of Jachimowicz Law Group (Tel: 408-246-5500) for Plaintiff Sharon Schibler;
Atty. MARC BRAINICH, Esq. of Wendel Rosen LLP (Tel: 510-834-6600) for Defendant The Regents of the University of California.

Hearing Re: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents And Form Interrogs.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for both sides authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted.

The Court takes the matter under submission.
